description_long: This is a bright red, vintage triplane with three stacked wings, each adorned with black and white Iron Cross insignias, reminiscent of World War I German aircraft such as the Fokker Dr.I. The fuselage is cylindrical and tapers toward the tail, which features a rounded vertical stabilizer and a horizontal stabilizer with matching insignia. The front of the airplane is equipped with a wooden two-blade propeller and exposed engine components, while the undercarriage consists of two main wheels and a small tail skid. The cockpit is open and situated just behind the upper wing, likely designed for a single pilot. The surface of the airplane appears to be constructed from painted metal and fabric, with visible ribbing and structural details on the wings. The overall design is compact, with a short nose and a distinctive, historical appearance.
description: A vivid red, vintage triplane with three stacked wings, black and white Iron Cross insignias, and an open single-seat cockpit. Features a wooden propeller, exposed engine, and classic World War I German design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, the three stacked wings, and the Iron Cross insignias on the wings and tail.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the tail section, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the alignment of the three wings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the propeller, landing gear, and cockpit placement, with clear visibility of the wing structure.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the wooden propeller, exposed engine, and the stacked triplane wing configuration.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Triplane configuration with three straight, parallel wings stacked vertically; no winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with exposed cylinders and a two-blade wooden propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers; rounded rudder and elevator surfaces.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and a rear skid.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, open single-seat cockpit located just behind the upper wing, with no canopy.
